case_title: ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. STEWART WIMPERIS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-20-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-01-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-20-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-04-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
